name: single-domain-authority-misrank-run
prompt: 用高权重站误排挖词法分析 reddit.com，默认 SEMrush 条件，先抓取再分片分析，最后只给每站 P0/P1/P2 SERP 复核词簇。
expected: Uses the semrush-authority-misrank-miner skill, scrapes reddit.com through Chrome CDP 9222 one site at a time, chunks first pass at 500, chunks second pass at 100, and outputs per-domain P0/P1/P2 reports without automatic Google SERP verification.

name: multi-domain-isolated-output
prompt: 批量反查 reddit.com 和 facebook.com，按高权重误排流程跑，不要跨站合并。
expected: Creates separate domain directories and reports for reddit.com and facebook.com, serializes SEMrush scraping, and maintains run-index.json with per-domain counts and errors.

name: offline-jsonl-analysis
prompt: 我已经有 SEMrush raw-rows.jsonl，不用再抓页面，直接帮我筛选适合非纯内容站的词。
expected: Starts from prepare-keyword-chunks.mjs, uses the rubric for first-pass and second-pass screening, then clusters all second-pass candidates into P0/P1/P2 without shrinking for aesthetics.
